title: was / were
objectives: Geçmişte bir kişinin veya şeyin durumunu anlatmak.
I / he / she / it ile was kullanmak.
you / we / they ile were kullanmak.
wasn't / weren't ile olumsuz cümle kurmak.
Was...? / Were...? ile basit soru sormak.

parentGuide.summaryTr: Önce bugünü, sonra dünü karşılaştırın: She is at home today. She was at school yesterday. Özneye göre was / were seçimini kısa örneklerle pekiştirin.
parentGuide.todayGoal: Geçmişte bir kişinin veya şeyin durumunu anlatmak.
teachingTips: Bu derste "was / were" hedefini kısa örneklerle tekrar edin.
Yanlış cevaplarda cümledeki ipucu kelimeyi buldurun.
Voleybol, müzik ve günlük hayat örnekleriyle özgün cümle kurdurun.
questionsToAsk: She was happy after the match.
It was cold in the morning.
listeningScripts: "Last Saturday, the school hall was full. The stage was ready, and the microphones were in front of the singers. The students were excited. The teachers were near the doors."
speakingRubric: 10 puan: Dört öz değerlendirme maddesi tamam
0 puan: Örnekleri tekrar dinleyip yeniden deneme

worksheet.title: was / were Çalışma Sayfası
worksheet.instructionTr: Soruları kaynak dersteki kurala göre çöz.

questions.prompt: Sırala: was / she / at home / yesterday
Hatayı düzelt: They was in the classroom.
Where was Beyza in the morning?
was / were yapısını kullanarak özgün bir cümle yaz.

answerKey: Öğrencinin hedef kurala uygun özgün cevabı kontrol edilir.
Öğrencinin hedef kurala uygun özgün cevabı kontrol edilir.

screens.title: was / were
screens.instructionTr: Geçmişte bir kişinin veya şeyin durumunu anlatmak.

screens.title: Türkçe konu anlatımı
screens.instructionTr: Was ve were, am / is / are yapısının geçmiş hâlidir. - I am tired today. → I was tired yesterday. - She is at school now. → She was at school yesterday. - They are happy now. → They were happy yesterday. Kural: - I / He / She / It → was - You / We / They → were Olumsuz: - was not → wasn't - were not → weren't Soru: - Was she at home? - Were they tired?

content.noteTr: Was ve were, am / is / are yapısının geçmiş hâlidir. - I am tired today. → I was tired yesterday. - She is at school now. → She was at school yesterday. - They are happy now. → They were happy yesterday. Kural: - I / He / She / It → was - You / We / They → were Olumsuz: - was not → wasn't - were not → weren't Soru: - Was she at home? - Were they tired?

examples: She was happy after the match.
It was cold in the morning.
They were in the sports hall.
Was the coach at the match?
Were the microphones on the stage?

screens.title: Kural tablosu
screens.explanationTr: Geçmişte bir kişinin veya şeyin durumunu anlatmak. I / he / she / it ile was kullanmak. you / we / they ile were kullanmak. wasn't / weren't ile olumsuz cümle kurmak. Was...? / Were...? ile basit soru sormak.

examples: I were tired. ❌ → I was tired. ✅
They was happy. ❌ → They were happy. ✅
She didn't was at home. ❌ → She wasn't at home. ✅
Was they ready? ❌ → Were they ready? ✅
content.noteTr: Yanlışta özne, yardımcı fiil, zaman ipucu ve anlamı birlikte kontrol et.

optionExplanationsTr: Doğru. was seçeneği cümledeki hedef kurala uyar.
"were" seçeneği bu cümledeki özne, zaman veya anlam ipucuyla uyuşmuyor; doğru cevap "was" çünkü was seçeneği cümledeki hedef kurala uyar.
"is" seçeneği bu cümledeki özne, zaman veya anlam ipucuyla uyuşmuyor; doğru cevap "was" çünkü was seçeneği cümledeki hedef kurala uyar.
"was" seçeneği bu cümledeki özne, zaman veya anlam ipucuyla uyuşmuyor; doğru cevap "were" çünkü were seçeneği cümledeki hedef kurala uyar.
Doğru. were seçeneği cümledeki hedef kurala uyar.
"are" seçeneği bu cümledeki özne, zaman veya anlam ipucuyla uyuşmuyor; doğru cevap "were" çünkü were seçeneği cümledeki hedef kurala uyar.

screens.title: Boşluk doldurma

content.explanationTr: "was" boşluğu cümlenin hedef kuralına göre tamamlar.

screens.hintTr: Geçmişte bir kişinin veya şeyin durumunu anlatmak.

content.explanationTr: Doğru sıra: she was at home yesterday
Eşleşen parçalar birlikte doğru ve anlamlı cümle oluşturur.

content.text: Yesterday was a busy day. Beyza was at school in the morning. In the afternoon, she was at volleyball practice. Her friends were there too. The coach was happy because everyone was on time.

questions.prompt: Where was Beyza in the morning?
explanationsTr: Doğru. Bu soruda cevap "She was at school." olmalıdır.
"She was at volleyball practice." bu sorudaki kişi, zaman veya anlam ipucuyla uyuşmuyor; doğru cevap "She was at school.".
"Because everyone was on time." bu sorudaki kişi, zaman veya anlam ipucuyla uyuşmuyor; doğru cevap "She was at school.".

questions.prompt: Where was she in the afternoon?
explanationsTr: "Because everyone was on time." bu sorudaki kişi, zaman veya anlam ipucuyla uyuşmuyor; doğru cevap "She was at volleyball practice.".
Doğru. Bu soruda cevap "She was at volleyball practice." olmalıdır.
"She was at school." bu sorudaki kişi, zaman veya anlam ipucuyla uyuşmuyor; doğru cevap "She was at volleyball practice.".
"She was at school." bu sorudaki kişi, zaman veya anlam ipucuyla uyuşmuyor; doğru cevap "Because everyone was on time.".
"She was at volleyball practice." bu sorudaki kişi, zaman veya anlam ipucuyla uyuşmuyor; doğru cevap "Because everyone was on time.".
Doğru. Bu soruda cevap "Because everyone was on time." olmalıdır.

content.audioText: "Last Saturday, the school hall was full. The stage was ready, and the microphones were in front of the singers. The students were excited. The teachers were near the doors."

explanationsTr: Doğru. Bu soruda cevap "Last Saturday." olmalıdır.
"In front of the singers." bu sorudaki kişi, zaman veya anlam ipucuyla uyuşmuyor; doğru cevap "Last Saturday.".
"Yes, they were." bu sorudaki kişi, zaman veya anlam ipucuyla uyuşmuyor; doğru cevap "Last Saturday.".
"Yes, they were." bu sorudaki kişi, zaman veya anlam ipucuyla uyuşmuyor; doğru cevap "In front of the singers.".
Doğru. Bu soruda cevap "In front of the singers." olmalıdır.
"Last Saturday." bu sorudaki kişi, zaman veya anlam ipucuyla uyuşmuyor; doğru cevap "In front of the singers.".
"Last Saturday." bu sorudaki kişi, zaman veya anlam ipucuyla uyuşmuyor; doğru cevap "Yes, they were.".
"In front of the singers." bu sorudaki kişi, zaman veya anlam ipucuyla uyuşmuyor; doğru cevap "Yes, they were.".
Doğru. Bu soruda cevap "Yes, they were." olmalıdır.

screens.title: Konuşma görevi
screens.instructionTr: Dün nerede olduğunu ve nasıl hissettiğini söyle: - I was at ... - I was ... - My family were ...

screens.title: Kelime Avı
screens.instructionTr: Bu dersin hedef kelimeleriyle kısa tekrar oyunu oyna.

points: Geçmişte bir kişinin veya şeyin durumunu anlatmak.
I / he / she / it ile was kullanmak.
Hedef kelimeler: yesterday, last night, busy, excited, late, ready, full
